title: Expression returns [undefined] instead of value
symptom: When trying to access a value from a previous node using an expression, the output is [undefined]. This occurs intermittently, causing confusion.
applies_when: Using expressions to access previous node data
Data structure may vary between executions
not_this_if: The expression correctly references a valid path
The data structure is consistent across executions
root_cause: The error occurs because the expression is referencing a path that does not exist on the current item. Even if the data is present in a previous node, the current execution context may not have the same structure, leading to undefined values.
fix_steps: Check the execution preview to confirm the current item's structure
Adjust the expression to match the correct path, e.g., {{$json.id}} or {{$node[“Set”].json[“user”][“id”]}}
agent_instruction: Verify the data structure in the execution preview and update the expression accordingly.
